title: Supreme Court seeks Centre's response on plea to ban animal sacrifice in temples
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday issued notice to the Union Ministry of Animal Husbandry in a petition seeking a ban on the killing of animals in the name of religion.A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta sought a response from the Central government and listed it after a month."Issue notice, returnable in 4 weeks," the Court ordered.Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep MehtaThe Public Interest Litigation (PIL) filed by Advocate Shruti Bisht alleges official inaction against the kill
